## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss performance, localization strategy, and competitive positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site performance is improving with increased impressions and stable clicks](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Japan localization successful; Traditional Chinese identified as next priority market](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Firework looking to expand thought leadership content and backlink strategy](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [LLM optimization efforts underway; Firework performing best on Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Topics

### Site Performance Update

  - [July impressions and clicks up significantly (89K+ increase)](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [36 total leads with 12 U.S.-specific leads, showing improvement](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Blog content performance growing steadily since April](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Top performing content includes TikTok, fashion trends, and video statistics](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Localization Strategy

  - [Japan continues to perform well; recommended to keep translating content](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Traditional Chinese identified as next priority due to traffic from Hong Kong/China](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Italy and Brazil suggested as future markets based on lead volume](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Need for comprehensive strategy for new language rollouts, including operational considerations](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)

### Thought Leadership and Backlinking

  - [Firework exploring thought leadership content, e.g. recent post with advisor Keith](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [GrowthX suggested LinkedIn thought leadership posts for executives](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Discussion on developing a more robust backlinking strategy to improve search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

### LLM Optimization

  - [44% of tested prompts showed zero brand presence across LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Firework performing best on Perplexity, lower on ChatGPT and Claude](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Identified key competitors: Bambuser, Syndigo, Bazaarvoice, Salsify, VideoWise, Tolstoy](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

### Product Positioning

  - [Shift from "live shopping" terminology to "24/7 live stream" or "ongoing live streams"](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Emphasis on reusability and continuous engagement vs. one-time events](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
  - [Need to differentiate Firework's offering from competitors in enterprise space](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update LLM tracking with refined competitor list and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1859.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting in two weeks to discuss Chinese localization strategy with Cameron](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Review and potentially implement thought leadership content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Explore development of a more comprehensive backlinking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Refine product positioning language around live streaming capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/aNAzyrdXv13faxe-CG6Vz4u42aEbjP5a?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
